revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初一]][[zh:二月初一]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 1|qq=February 1}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Richū|en|Emperor Richū|qid=Q329704|lt=Emperor Ritchū|1=Emperor Richū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|400|en|400|qid=Q25621|lt=400|1=400}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}}) – The 17th emperor, {{ill|Emperor Richū|en|Emperor Richū|qid=Q329704|lt=Emperor Ritchū|1=Emperor Richū}}, ascended the throne. {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|qid=Q423370|lt=Taihō|1=Taiho}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|702|en|702|qid=Q23497|lt=702|1=702}} {{ill|March 3|en|March 3|qid=Q2391|lt=March 3|1=March 3}}) – The previously established {{ill|Taihō Code|en|Taihō Code|qid=Q1059892|lt=Taihō Code|1=Taihō Code}} was distributed throughout the provinces. * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1684|en|1684|qid=Q7654|lt=1684|1=1684}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – Figures from {{ill|Jōruri (music)|en|Jōruri (music)|qid=Q1361891|lt=Joruri|1=Jōruri (music)}} such as {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|en|Takemoto Gidayū|qid=Q2389434|lt=Takemoto Gidaitō|1=Takemoto Gidayū}} opened the {{ill|Takemoto-za|en|Takemoto-za|qid=Q1154727|lt=Takemoto-za|1=Takemoto-za}} theater in {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka|1=Ōsaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11439906}} and along {{ill|Dōtonbori|en|Dōtonbori|qid=Q964876|lt=Dōtonbori|1=Dōtonbori}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|March 9|en|March 9|qid=Q2401|lt=March 9|1=March 9}}) – Japan’s first modern family registers, the {{ill|Koseki|ja|戸籍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Family register|qid=Q485228}} and the {{ill|Ninshin Koseki|ja|壬申戸籍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninshin Koseki|1=jinshin koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11429522}}, were completed. == Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} {{ill|February 26|en|February 26|qid=Q2359|lt=February 26|1=February 26}}) – {{ill|Gosei Tafayagi|ja|五姓田芳柳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosei Tafayagi|1=Goseda Hōryū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11372291}}, a Western-style painter ({{ill|yogaka|ja|洋Painter|1=Yōga painter|2=ja|3=洋画家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yogaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q67200599}}) (died {{ill|1892|en|1892|qid=Q7839|lt=1892|1=1892}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|March 7|en|March 7|qid=Q2394|lt=March 7|1=March 7}}) – {{ill|Kojima Izeki|ja|児島惟謙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kojima Izeki|1=Kojima Iken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3701476}}, head of the Supreme Court ({{ill|Supreme Court of Judicature of Japan|en|Supreme Court of Judicature of Japan|qid=Q858168|lt=Daishin'in|1=Supreme Court of Judicature of Japan}}) and judge in the Ōtsu Incident (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|qid=Q2056|lt=1908|1=1908}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|qid=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – {{ill|Ii Naomasa|en|Ii Naomasa|qid=Q1334437|lt=Ii Naomasa|1=Ii Naomasa}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}}) and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of the Tokugawa (born {{ill|1561|en|1561|qid=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}}). <Note: Other sources list dates as “February 29” or “January 21” for related figures.> == Commemorations == * 二月礼者 : A custom where those who could not complete the New Year’s rounds perform greeting visits on February 1. * 重ね正月・一夜正月 : A folk custom intended to help people in their unlucky years “age” one year early so as to quickly pass through the inauspicious period.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|30|2|2|1|1|3|2|0201|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 1일]] [[ja:2月1日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初一]]
[[ar:February 1 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初一]] {{wikidata link|Q839036}} [[Category:Days 1 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar February]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
